policy: Only first-party government, public institution, or official programme portals are included. Aggregators, copied listings, social posts, and unverified submissions are excluded.

sources.name: Directorate of Collegiate Education
sources.authority: Department of Higher Education, Government of Tamil Nadu
sources.coverage: Government Arts and Science College admissions, announcements and related higher-education notices

sources.name: Tamil Nadu Institute of Labour Studies
sources.coverage: Admissions, labour-management courses, professional programmes and training calendar

sources.name: Department of Employment and Training
sources.coverage: Employment registration, career guidance, competitive-exam coaching, job fairs and skill-training guidance

sources.name: Tamil Nadu Employment Exchange Job Fair Portal
sources.authority: Department of Employment and Training, Government of Tamil Nadu
sources.coverage: Official job-fair registration, candidate instructions and public placement events

sources.name: Training and Employment for Differently Abled Persons
sources.authority: Commissionerate for Welfare of the Differently Abled, Government of Tamil Nadu
sources.coverage: District-level skill training, multimedia training, employment support and self-employment schemes

sources.name: Overseas Manpower Corporation Limited
sources.coverage: Official overseas employment, nursing, candidate and student registration opportunities

sources.name: Naan Mudhalvan
sources.authority: Tamil Nadu Skill Development Corporation, Government of Tamil Nadu
sources.coverage: Student skill development, industry-aligned learning, bootcamps, competitions and career-readiness programmes
